name: Baby Jean
description: '''Baby Jean''' (born '''Habish Rahman''') is an Indian rapper, singer, songwriter and actor from [[Kerala]]. He is associated with the Malayalam hip hop scene and came to wider attention with songs including "Kaayi". He has been identified among the emerging names in Malayalam rap by publications such as ''[[The Indian Express]]'', ''[[Onmanorama]]'' and ''[[Rolling Stone India]]''. He made his acting debut in the 2025 Malayalam film ''[[Alappuzha Gymkhana]]''.
